Name: FCheckBoxStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SCheckBox

Variables.Name: CheckBoxType
Variables.Description: The visual type of the checkbox

Variables.Name: UncheckedImage
Variables.Description: CheckBox appearance when the CheckBox is unchecked (normal)

Variables.Name: UncheckedHoveredImage
Variables.Description: CheckBox appearance when the CheckBox is unchecked and hovered

Variables.Name: UncheckedPressedImage
Variables.Description: CheckBox appearance when the CheckBox is unchecked and hovered

Variables.Name: CheckedImage
Variables.Description: CheckBox appearance when the CheckBox is checked

Variables.Name: CheckedHoveredImage
Variables.Description: CheckBox appearance when checked and hovered

Variables.Name: CheckedPressedImage
Variables.Description: CheckBox appearance when checked and pressed

Variables.Name: UndeterminedImage
Variables.Description: CheckBox appearance when the CheckBox is undetermined

Variables.Name: UndeterminedHoveredImage
Variables.Description: CheckBox appearance when CheckBox is undetermined and hovered

Variables.Name: UndeterminedPressedImage
Variables.Description: CheckBox appearance when CheckBox is undetermined and pressed

Variables.Name: BorderBackgroundColor
Variables.Description: BorderBackgroundColor refers to the actual color and opacity of the supplied border image on toggle buttons

Variables.Name: CheckedSlateSound
Variables.Description: The sound the check box should play when checked

Variables.Name: UncheckedSlateSound
Variables.Description: The sound the check box should play when unchecked

Variables.Name: HoveredSlateSound
Variables.Description: The sound the check box should play when initially hovered over
